service_group: Payroll, HR Tax, VAT and Fiscal Planning

services.name: Payroll Outsourcing
services.description: Outsourced payroll services including salary calculation, payroll statements, personnel documents and D112 filing.

services.name: Employment Cost Advisory
services.description: Advisory support for calculating total employment cost, salary scenarios, contributions and benefits.

services.name: HR Tax Reporting Support
services.description: Support for payroll-related HR reporting, employee benefits taxation and salary tax compliance.

services.name: Payroll Legislation Monitoring
services.description: Monitoring of Romanian labour law and salary tax changes affecting payroll and employment costs.

services.name: Remote Employee Payroll
services.description: Payroll services for remote employees across multiple Romanian cities, with centralized reporting and remote document processing.

services.name: Corporate and Microenterprise Tax Declarations
services.description: Preparation and filing of quarterly and annual tax declarations for corporate profit tax and microenterprise tax regimes.

services.name: VAT Returns and Refund Support
services.description: Preparation of VAT returns, VAT deductibility review, VAT refund support and correction of previous VAT errors.

services.name: Ongoing Tax Planning
services.description: Continuous tax planning for SMEs and shareholders, covering investments, dividends and legal tax optimization.

services.name: Administrator Salary vs Dividends Advisory
services.description: Advisory support for optimizing the mix between administrator salary and dividends.

services.name: Rectifying Tax Returns and Fiscal Error Correction
services.description: Correction of previous tax errors and preparation of rectifying tax returns for ANAF.
